description_long: This is a black mesh trucker cap with a structured front panel and a curved bill. The front features a printed graphic with the text 'FAREWELL THE JUDDS TOUR 1991 LOVE CAN BUILD A BRIDGE' in red and white, giving it a vintage concert memorabilia appearance. The back and sides are made of a black mesh material, providing ventilation and a lightweight feel. The cap has an adjustable plastic snapback closure at the rear, allowing for size customization. The bill is slightly curved and appears to be made of a stiffer fabric, while the crown is high and structured. The overall condition suggests some wear, with visible dust or fading on the bill.
description: A black mesh trucker cap with a printed 'FAREWELL THE JUDDS TOUR 1991' graphic on the structured front and an adjustable snapback closure.
